to: ask an officer of the Service or a Welsh family proceedings officer to monitor compliance with a child arrangements order

conditions.text: in any family proceedings the court makes a child arrangements order or an order varying a child arrangements order

to: ask an officer of the Service or a Welsh family proceedings officer to report on matters relating to an individual's compliance with a child arrangements order

conditions.text: in any family proceedings the court makes a child arrangements order or an order varying a child arrangements order

for: the officer of the Service or Welsh family proceedings officer
to: comply with any request under subsection (2)
order any individual falling within subsection (3) to take steps to enable compliance with the court's request under subsection (2)
make an order under subsection (8) with respect to an individual who is a child unless he is a parent of the child
make a request under subsection (2) in relation to a child arrangements order that is an excepted order
